description: An information-request follow-up whose draft makes a claim that is NOT in the approved-claims set. The claims-in-approved-set gate blocks — the model can never introduce an unapproved claim into applicant-facing content.

approvedClaims: Our program includes weekly live coaching sessions.

evidenceRecords.content: I want to move into a senior data analyst role within 3 months.

output_schema_constraints: the draft's claimsManifest contains a claim absent from approvedClaims (e.g. 'Our alumni all get hired at FAANG.')
run is policy_blocked at claims-in-approved-set; zero artifact rows
